prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger** (82mm compressor wheel, 62mm turbine) for the **CJXB 2.5L TFSI (EA855 Evo)** engine, paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** and **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe** with **Vibrant 1799 resonated muffler delete** for optimized spool and 550+ WHP on **E85 blend** with **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management

Full **APR Stage 3+ fuel system** including **Bosch Motorsport 0261002047 1,000cc/min port injectors**, **AEM 340lph in-tank fuel pump**, **Radium Engineering dual feed fuel rail**, and **NGK 97506 (R8 coil-on-plug) ignition coils** with **Denso Iridium IKH22TT spark plugs** for sustained high-RPM power under boost

Custom **034 Motorsport billet aluminum motor mounts** with **034 Density Line subframe collars**, **H&R 27mm front sway bar**, and **KW Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers (24-way rebound, 16-way compression, adjustable top mounts)** with **SuperPro 8036K poly bushings** for chassis rigidity and track-ready handling
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (FRP construction, 30mm extended fenders, aggressive front splitter with carbon dive planes) paired with **Audi Sport Performance rear diffuser** and **custom 3M Matte Brilliant Black vinyl wrap** with **OEM+ gloss black mirror caps**

**OEM Euro-spec LED headlights (8S0 941 008/009)** with **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes** and **Morimoto XB LED fog lights**, complemented by **VMR V710 19x9.5 ET35 wheels** in **Gunmetal Finish** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/30/19)** for aggressive stance

**Recaro Sportster CS bucket seats (Audi TT RS-specific mounting brackets)** upholstered in **Alcantara with red contrast stitching**, **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and **custom roll cage (T45 steel, bolt-in, powder-coated gloss black)** with **Sparco 6-point harnesses** for track-day readiness
